vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g must be a numeric grams value
Each required evidence_features must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops

verify.value: All parts and features traceable to part_tree
verify.rule: Training-quality rule: make part_tree children and geometry_ops mutually traceable by id/name

verify.value: Interfaces named with exact neighboring subsystem labels
verify.rule: Name exact neighboring subsystem labels when they mate, and choose connection_type + DOF + clearance_mm + required_feature

verify.value: Visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence on critical joints
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible insert/washer/locking/preload evidence and torque_Nm or preload intent

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to complex interface geometries
risk.mit: Implement detailed assembly instructions and training

risk.desc: Risk of thermal expansion causing stress on fuselage spine
risk.mit: Use thermally stable materials and design with expansion gaps

risk.desc: Difficulty in maintaining precise fit during manufacturing
risk.mit: Enhance manufacturing process control and inspection

risk.desc: Potential for water ingress through camera window seals
risk.mit: Specify high-quality sealing materials and conduct waterproof testing

risk.desc: Risk of damage to avionics during service access
risk.mit: Design robust access panels and provide protective covers

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Structural backbone, avionics housing, and mounting point for GPS and camera

physics_paths.path: Wing spar loads -> Fuselage spine -> Landing gear mounts
Heat dissipation from avionics bay -> Fuselage skin -> Ambient air
Nacelle tilt mechanism -> Bearing seats -> Fuselage spine
Avionics bay -> Harness passthroughs -> Flight control systems
Access panels -> Avionics bay -> Service ports

integration_opportunities.opportunity: Integrate wing spar attachment points for easy assembly
Ensure proper alignment for V-tail installation
Facilitate landing gear installation and maintenance

manufacturing_strategy.datum: Primary locating faces and rail guides
manufacturing_strategy.tolerance: ±0.5mm for critical interfaces, ±1mm for non-critical features
manufacturing_strategy.support: Support structures designed for FDM process
manufacturing_strategy.inspection: Visual inspection for surface finish and dimensional accuracy

verification_focus.value: Check snap-fit and bolted connections for proper fit
Verify ease of access for maintenance and repair

risk.mit: Use precise alignment tools and ensure proper torque settings.

risk.mit: Ensure sufficient clearance and lubrication of servo linkage.

risk.desc: Risk of electrical interference if harness routing is not properly managed.
